title: X-tra Velvety Italian Lettuce Trofie Pasta
description: A festive Italian dish featuring trofie pasta cut into katsuramuki, served with a grassy, velvety sauce and topped with crispy lettuce curls.

ingredients.name: lettuce
ingredients.notes: use a firm, green lettuce variety

instructions: Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil and cook trofie pasta according to package instructions.
In a large skillet, heat olive oil over medium heat and sauté garlic until fragrant.
Add white wine and chicken broth to the skillet and simmer until reduced by half.
Add parmesan cheese, nutritional yeast, salt, and black pepper to the skillet and stir to combine.
Add cooked trofie pasta to the skillet and toss with the sauce until well coated.
Top the pasta with crispy lettuce curls and serve immediately.
To make crispy lettuce curls, slice a large head of lettuce into thin strips and separate the leaves.
Heat a small amount of olive oil in a skillet over medium heat and sauté the lettuce strips until crispy and golden brown.
Drain the lettuce curls on paper towels and season with salt to taste.
